title: Construct the Lexicographically Largest Valid Sequence
titleCn: 构建字典序最大的可行序列

testcases.input: n = 3 Output: [3,1,2,3,2] Explanation: [2,3,2,1,3] is also a valid sequence, but [3,1,2,3,2] is the lexicographically largest valid sequence.
testcases.expectedOutput: [3,1,2,3,2] Explanation: [2,3,2,1,3] is also a valid sequence, but [3,1,2,3,2] is the lexicographically largest valid sequence.
